response.justification: Maria brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong depth in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and directly relevant AI-agent development experience through MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. Her craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and polyglot range make her a solid fit for an internal automation tooling role, though Nest.js and Kotlin exposure are not evidenced and would need probing in an interview.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB expertise matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — a rare required skill
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience indicating good communication
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin is absent and Java/Python exposure appears limited or dated
No explicit mention of Vitest/Playwright or PostgreSQL, though adjacent testing and database experience exists
